section.title: Does missing a service automatically void the warranty?
section.p: Warranty eligibility may be affected if scheduled services are not completed within the required timeframe. Final determination follows internal review procedures.

section.title: Can servicing be completed at any workshop?
section.p: Customers should follow official guidance regarding authorized service pathways.

section.title: How are software updates handled?
section.p: Software updates may be delivered over-the-air or during scheduled service appointments.
